name: test321
query:
select
AA.CustomerOrLead,
AA.Name,
AA.Division,
AA.Engineer,
(case when AA.Day1 = 0 then '' else AA.Day1 end) as "1:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day2 = 0 then '' else AA.Day2 end) as "2:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day3 = 0 then '' else AA.Day3 end) as "3:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day4 = 0 then '' else AA.Day4 end) as "4:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day5 = 0 then '' else AA.Day5 end) as "5:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day6 = 0 then '' else AA.Day6 end) as "6:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day7 = 0 then '' else AA.Day7 end) as "7:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day8 = 0 then '' else AA.Day8 end) as "8:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day9 = 0 then '' else AA.Day9 end) as "9:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day10 = 0 then '' else AA.Day10 end) as "10:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day11 = 0 then '' else AA.Day11 end) as "11:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day12 = 0 then '' else AA.Day12 end) as "12:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day13 = 0 then '' else AA.Day13 end) as "13:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day14 = 0 then '' else AA.Day14 end) as "14:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day15 = 0 then '' else AA.Day15 end) as "15:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day16 = 0 then '' else AA.Day16 end) as "16:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day17 = 0 then '' else AA.Day17 end) as "17:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day18 = 0 then '' else AA.Day18 end) as "18:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day19 = 0 then '' else AA.Day19 end) as "19:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day20 = 0 then '' else AA.Day20 end) as "20:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day21 = 0 then '' else AA.Day21 end) as "21:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day22 = 0 then '' else AA.Day22 end) as "22:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day23 = 0 then '' else AA.Day23 end) as "23:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day24 = 0 then '' else AA.Day24 end) as "24:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day25 = 0 then '' else AA.Day25 end) as "25:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day26 = 0 then '' else AA.Day26 end) as "26:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day27 = 0 then '' else AA.Day27 end) as "27:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day28 = 0 then '' else AA.Day28 end) as "28:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day29 = 0 then '' else AA.Day29 end) as "29:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day30 = 0 then '' else AA.Day30 end) as "30:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day31 = 0 then '' else AA.Day31 end) as "31:Data:100",
AA.Total as "Total:data:100"
from
(

SELECT 
    CV.customer AS "CustomerOrLead",
    CV.customer_name AS "Name",
    CV.employee_name AS "Engineer",
    CV.division AS "Division",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day1",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day2",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day3",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day4",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day5",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day6",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day7",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day8",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 9 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day9",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day10",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 11 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day11",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day12",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day13",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day14",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day15",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 16 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day16",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 17 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day17",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day18",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 19 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day19",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day20",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 21 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day21",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 22 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day22",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 23 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day23",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 24 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day24",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 25 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day25",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 26 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day26",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 27 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day27",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 28 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day28",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 29 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day29",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day30",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 31 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day31",
    COUNT(*) AS "Total"
FROM 
    `tabCustomer Visit` AS CV
WHERE 
    DATE(CV.date) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
    AND CV.company = %(company)s
    and CV.customer <> ''
GROUP BY 
    CV.customer, CV.employee

union all 
SELECT 
    CV.lead AS "CustomerOrLead",
    CV.lead_name AS "Name",
    CV.employee_name AS "Engineer",
    CV.division AS "Division",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day1",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day2",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day3",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day4",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day5",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day6",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day7",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day8",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 9 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day9",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day10",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 11 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day11",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day12",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day13",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day14",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day15",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 16 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day16",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 17 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day17",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day18",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 19 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day19",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day20",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 21 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day21",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 22 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day22",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 23 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day23",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 24 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day24",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 25 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day25",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 26 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day26",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 27 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day27",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 28 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day28",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 29 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day29",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day30",
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(CV.date) = 31 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Day31",
    COUNT(*) AS "Total"
FROM 
    `tabCustomer Visit` AS CV
WHERE 
    DATE(CV.date) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
    AND CV.company = %(company)s
    and CV.lead_name <>''
GROUP BY 
    CV.lead, CV.employee



)AA
order by AA.Engineer
